message:
feat(dashboard): add historical log search

Add server-side log history storage with search capability:
- LogHistory stores up to 10,000 recent log lines per task
- Case-insensitive text search across all stored logs
- Filter by stream (stdout/stderr)
- New API endpoint: GET /api/vm-logs/{id}?q=query&stream=stderr
- UI with Live/Search mode toggle in the logs panel
- Debounced search input for responsive experience

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

x-data="{ logs: [], pendingLines: [], + searchResults: [], mode: 'live', filter: '', + searchQuery: '', + searchStream: 'all', paused: false, connected: false, - maxLogs: 500 + searching: false, + maxLogs: 500, + searchTimeout: null, + async searchLogs() { + if (!this.searchQuery.trim()) { + this.searchResults = []; + return; + } + this.searching = true; + try { + const params = new URLSearchParams({ q: this.searchQuery }); + if (this.searchStream !== 'all') { + params.set('stream', this.searchStream); + } + const resp = await fetch('/api/vm-logs/{{.Task.ID}}?' + params); + const data = await resp.json(); + this.searchResults = (data || []).map(line => ({ + id: line.timestamp + Math.random(), + time: new Date(line.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString(), + stream: line.stream, + line: line.text + })); + } catch (e) { + console.error('Log search failed:', e); + this.searchResults = []; + } + this.searching = false; + }, + debouncedSearch() { + clearTimeout(this.searchTimeout); + this.searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => this.searchLogs(), 300); + } }" x-init=" const ws = new WebSocket('ws://' + window.location.host + '/ws?task={{.Task.ID}}'); @@ -284,17 +318,38 @@
